notes: Real fix for projection wrap: added <colgroup> with <col> elements. table-layout: fixed reads widths from <col> first, which sticky cells can't override. Each row now has a hard-locked 180px first column and 120px value columns on desktop. On mobile, percentages on cols: 36% / 21% × 3. Cols outside the visible 3-month window use visibility:collapse to release their layout width. Removed the overflow:hidden hack from v35 (was clipping instead of wrapping). Now if text doesn't fit it WILL wrap to the next line.
